message:
feat(dolt): add WithScripts init SQL to testcontainers for root@% auth fix

Creates root@'%' user at container init via dolt.WithScripts(), so the
testcontainers module can connect from Docker NAT. Pins Windows image
to 1.43.0 to match Unix. Unblocks upgrading to latest Dolt once the
upstream auth bug is fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: gastown/crew/max
Rig: gastown
Role: crew
